prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to England and Wales, referencing regulations and monitoring efforts that do not extend to Scotland. The Environment Agency's activities and the Environmental Quality Standards mentioned are not applicable to Scotland, which has its own regulatory bodies and ecological frameworks.
